code: export const MENU=[{id:1,name:"Dal Bhat Thali",nep:"दाल भात",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:450,desc:"Traditional rice & lentil plate with seasonal vegetables, achaar, and papad.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1585937421612-70a008356fbe?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"The heartbeat of every Nepali household. Slow-cooked lentils, steamed rice, two seasonal vegetables, house pickle, and papad — unlimited refills."},{id:2,name:"Chicken Momo",nep:"चिकन मोमो",cat:"Momos",price:280,desc:"Steamed dumplings with spiced minced chicken. Served with house achar.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534422298391-e4f8c172dddb?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular","spicy"],famous:true,famDesc:"Nepal's most beloved street food elevated. Complete meal with buckwheat dal, mountain-style curries, fermented gundruk greens, and crispy sel roti."},{id:6,name:"Sel Roti",nep:"सेल रोटी",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:150,desc:"Crispy ring-shaped rice bread, best enjoyed with chiya or curry.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909114-f6e7ad7d3136?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","sweet"],famous:false},{id:7,name:"Gundruk",nep:"गुन्द्रुक",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:180,desc:"Fermented leafy greens — a Nepali superfood with deep umami flavour.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540189549336-e6e99c3679fe?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg"],famous:false},{id:8,name:"Dhido",nep:"ढिँडो",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:280,desc:"Millet or buckwheat porridge — the traditional staple of Nepal's hills.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1627308595229-7830a5c91f9f?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg"],famous:false},{id:9,name:"Thukpa",nep:"थुक्पा",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:320,desc:"Hearty Tibetan-style noodle soup with vegetables or chicken.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299507177-b0ac66763828?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"Tibetan comfort in a bowl. Rich broth, hand-pulled wheat noodles, seasonal vegetables, chilli oil, and a soft-boiled egg."},{id:10,name:"Newari Khaja Set",nep:"न्वारी खाजा",cat:"Newari",price:520,desc:"Traditional Newari platter with bara, chiura, egg, achar, and sukuti.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540189549336-e6e99c3679fe?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"The crown jewel of Newari cuisine. Beaten rice, lentil bara, spiced egg, dried meat sukuti, fresh achar, and black soybean."},{id:11,name:"Yomari",nep:"योमरी",cat:"Newari",price:180,desc:"Sweet steamed rice-flour dumpling filled with chaku and sesame.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558961363-fa8fdf82db35?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","sweet"],famous:false},{id:12,name:"Chatamari",nep:"चतांमरी",cat:"Newari",price:240,desc:"Newari rice crepe topped with minced meat, egg, or vegetables.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299507177-b0ac66763828?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"Nepal's ancient pizza. export const MENU = [
  {id:1,name:"Dal Bhat Thali",nep:"दाल भात",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:450,desc:"Traditional rice & lentil plate with seasonal vegetables, achaar, and papad.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1585937421612-70a008356fbe?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"The heartbeat of every Nepali household. Slow-cooked lentils, steamed rice, two seasonal vegetables, house pickle, and papad — unlimited refills."},
  {id:2,name:"Chicken Momo",nep:"चिकन मोमो",cat:"Momos",price:280,desc:"Steamed dumplings with spiced minced chicken. Served with house achar.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534422298391-e4f8c172dddb?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular","spicy"],famous:true,famDesc:"Nepal's most beloved street food elevated. Juicy chicken in hand-rolled dough with secret sesame-tomato achar."},
  {id:3,name:"Buff Momo",nep:"बफ मोमो",cat:"Momos",price:260,desc:"Classic Newari-style steamed dumplings with minced water buffalo meat.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534422298391-e4f8c172dddb?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular"],famous:false},

Complete meal with buckwheat dal, mountain-style curries, fermented gundruk greens, and crispy sel roti."},
  {id:6,name:"Sel Roti",nep:"सेल रोटी",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:150,desc:"Crispy ring-shaped rice bread, best enjoyed with chiya or curry.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909114-f6e7ad7d3136?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","sweet"],famous:false},

  {id:8,name:"Dhido",nep:"ढिँडो",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:280,desc:"Millet or buckwheat porridge — the traditional staple of Nepal's hills.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1627308595229-7830a5c91f9f?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg"],famous:false},
  {id:9,name:"Thukpa",nep:"थुक्पा",cat:"Dal Bhat",price:320,desc:"Hearty Tibetan-style noodle soup with vegetables or chicken.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299507177-b0ac66763828?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"Tibetan comfort in a bowl. Rich broth, hand-pulled wheat noodles, seasonal vegetables, chilli oil, and a soft-boiled egg."},
  {id:10,name:"Newari Khaja Set",nep:"न्वारी खाजा",cat:"Newari",price:520,desc:"Traditional Newari platter with bara, chiura, egg, achar, and sukuti.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540189549336-e6e99c3679fe?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"The crown jewel of Newari cuisine. Beaten rice, lentil bara, spiced egg, dried meat sukuti, fresh achar, and black soybean."},
  {id:11,name:"Yomari",nep:"योमरी",cat:"Newari",price:180,desc:"Sweet steamed rice-flour dumpling filled with chaku and sesame.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558961363-fa8fdf82db35?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","sweet"],famous:false},
  {id:12,name:"Chatamari",nep:"चतांमरी",cat:"Newari",price:240,desc:"Newari rice crepe topped with minced meat, egg, or vegetables.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299507177-b0ac66763828?w=500&q=80",tags:["popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"Nepal's ancient pizza. Thin crispy rice flour crepe with spiced minced buff, cracked egg, fresh herbs and chilli."},
  {id:13,name:"Sekuwa",nep:"सेकुवा",cat:"Newari",price:380,desc:"Marinated grilled meat skewers — smoky and tender.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555939594-58d7cb561ad1?w=500&q=80",tags:["spicy","popular"],famous:false},
  {id:14,name:"Panipuri",nep:"पानीपुरी",cat:"Street Food",price:120,desc:"Crispy hollow puris filled with spiced potato and tangy tamarind water.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1601050690597-df0568f70950?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","spicy"],famous:false},
  {id:15,name:"Chatpate",nep:"चटपटे",cat:"Street Food",price:100,desc:"Spicy puffed rice snack with cucumber, tomato, lime.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1601050690597-df0568f70950?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","spicy"],famous:false},

  {id:25,name:"Fish Fry",nep:"माछा फ्राई",cat:"Meat Dishes",price:360,desc:"Crispy battered fresh fish fillets with lime and chilli chutney.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299507177-b0ac66763828?w=500&q=80",tags:[],famous:false},

  {id:27,name:"Juju Dhau",nep:"जुजु धौ",cat:"Sweets",price:160,desc:"Bhaktapur's King Curd — thick creamy yoghurt in a clay pot.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558961363-fa8fdf82db35?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","sweet","popular"],famous:true,famDesc:"Bhaktapur's royal crown. Impossibly creamy yoghurt set in terracotta pots for centuries. Lightly sweet, silky, and utterly addictive."},
  {id:28,name:"Laddu",nep:"लड्डू",cat:"Sweets",price:80,desc:"Traditional sweet ball from chickpea flour, ghee, and sugar. 2 pcs.",img:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558961363-fa8fdf82db35?w=500&q=80",tags:["veg","sweet"],famous:false},
